dialogueChunks.intro: {target_npc} has not been the same lately, {player_name}. Since {quest_origin}, their behavior has been deteriorating and no one can reach them.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: At first it was just odd habits. Now they have barricaded themselves away, raving about things no one else can see. {quest_ally} tried to help but was driven off. Something at {quest_focus} is pulling them deeper.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need to get to the source and find out what is doing this. Can you help {quest_time_pressure} before {quest_threat} consumes them entirely?

playerResponses.text: I will try to reach them and find the cause.

dialogueChunks.intro: Half the settlement has been afflicted, {player_name}. {quest_focus} struck without warning, and {quest_threat} is spreading faster than we can understand.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} is one of the affected. They describe identical visions across every victim. This is not coincidence: something near {location_hint} is projecting this. Even the {enemy_type} in the area have been behaving erratically.
dialogueChunks.outro: People are terrified. We need to find what is causing {quest_threat} and put an end to it before the whole settlement falls apart.

playerResponses.text: I will track down whatever is doing this.
A shared affliction? That is deeply wrong.
It will pass on its own.

dialogueChunks.intro: Several of our people have lost themselves, {player_name}. They fled into the wilds near {location_hint}, unable to recognize anyone. It happened overnight.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} examined what they had been exposed to and found traces of something unnatural: {quest_item} residue that should not be there. {target_npc} thinks a cure is possible, but needs samples from the contamination site.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_focus} are still out there, lost to {quest_threat}. Find the source and bring back what {target_npc} needs. {quest_reward_hint} awaits if you succeed.

playerResponses.text: I will get the samples and save them.
Are they dangerous in this state?
